title: Nemotron 3 Super: open-source agentic AI — Apr 16
summary: Today, we cover NVIDIA's open-source Nemotron 3 Super model, Google's new Chrome 'Skills' for AI workflows, and OpenAI's acquisition of Hiro Finance. We also examine companies like Allbirds pivoting to AI and new research in optical computing and LLM reasoning.
